title: Waffle
description: Waffle: Property for 2D analytical elements, made up of a slab on top of parallel ribs running in two directions, all sharing the same material.

Name.description: A unique Name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

Thickness.description: The thickness of the slab sitting on top of the ribs. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

TotalDepthX.description: Total depth measured from the bottom of the ribs in local x-direction to the top of the slab. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

TotalDepthY.description: Total depth meassured from the bottom of the ribs in local y-direction to the top of the slab. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

StemWidthX.description: Width of each rib in local x-direction. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

StemWidthY.description: Width of each rib in local y-direction. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

SpacingX.description: Centre-Centre distance between the ribs running in local x-direction. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

SpacingY.description: Centre-Centre distance between the ribs running in local y-direction. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
